title: Operation Flotsam
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Operation}}
'''Operation Flotsam''' was an ongoing mission of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] to survey battle sites, examine wreckage and collect potentially dangerous or valuable artifacts.

Created and funded with the passing of the [[Historical Battle Site Preservation Act]], Operation Flotsam operated a varied fleet of old [[Gallofree Yards, Inc./Legends|Gallofree Yards, Inc.]] transports which carried any acquired debris and used automated [[SM-series scavenger droid]]s to scavenge battle sites. Once debris of interest was located, the SM-series droids worked with [[DA-series droid]]s to determine its relative value. Collected pieces were then cataloged, vetted by [[New Republic Intelligence Service]] and passed on for processing. The artifacts collected by Operation Flotsam were disabled for security reasons and displayed in the [[Alliance War Museum]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

The Operation was overseen by NRI [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Rin Hawaz]], who had previously analyzed the growth of private battle site [[Scavenger/Legends|scavengers]], and the effects the HBSPA and Flotsam had on their work.
